allow: PowerShell($src = "D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\Kerbal Space Program\\Ships\\VAB\\Gillyflower Station.craft"; $dstDir = "D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\Kerbal Space Program\\saves\\KSP\\Ships\\VAB"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $dstDir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dstDir | Out-Null }; Copy-Item $src $dstDir -Force; Get-ChildItem $dstDir | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell($log = "D:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\Kerbal Space Program\\KSP.log"; if \(Test-Path $log\) { Write-Output \("log modified: " + \(Get-Item $log\).LastWriteTime\); Select-String -Path $log -Pattern 'Gillyflower' -Context 0,4 | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line; $_.Context.PostContext } } else { Write-Output "no KSP.log found" })
